meta.title: How do you Become a FIGHTER PILOT? An F-35 Pilot talks about Pilot Training (SUPT)
meta.description:
In this video you'll learn from F-35 Fighter Pilot, "Hasard" Lee on what you can expect going through U.S. Air Force Pilot Training.

How to become a fighter pilot guide: 
https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/pilot-newsletter

Keep up and follow along at:
Podcast: https://www.professionalsplaybook.com/listen
LinkedIn-- https://www.linkedin.com/in/justinfighterpilot/
Instagram-- https://www.instagram.com/justinfighterpilot/
Facebook--https://www.facebook.com/justinfighterpilot/

#fighterpilot
#pilottraining
#supt
